scope_notes: Level 01 Ceiling Plan at 1:100 scale

Multiple ceiling assembly types: XC1 (Existing), C1 (Gypsum Wall Board), C2 (Suspended 2x4 ACT1), C3 (Suspended 3x2 ACT2), C4 (Acoustic Wood Slat Panel System), C5 (Rated Ceiling - 1hr FRR), C6 (Suspended Acoustic Ceiling Lid with 2x4 ACT1), C7 (Suspended Gypsum Wall Board Ceiling)
Ceiling heights indicated with '+' prefix notations throughout plan (e.g., +3550, +3960, +2400, +3028, +3060, +2325)
Ceiling in Electrical Rooms to be rated: 1HR FRR
Ceiling in Janitor Room to be rated: 40 Min FRR
Patch and repair existing ceiling as required noted in west zone
Align edge of ceiling to existing storefront wall
Bulkhead wall transition between different ceiling heights
C4 ceiling type at +1500 noted in main floor area

Rooms identified include: Meeting Room, Program Room, Kids, Stacks, Adult Lounge, Branch Processing, Branch Head Office, Janitor, Electrical, VPL Storage, Meeting Room 2, Mezzanine WC, Electrical Vault

RCP Legend includes: Ceiling Mounted Troffer Light, Suspended Linear Light, Recessed Linear Light, Recessed Pot Light, Feature Pendant Light, Reception Feature Light, Cove Light, Return/Exhaust Air Grille, Supply/Outdoor Air Duct, Sensor, Room Temperature Sensor
Fire Resistance Ratings: 1hr FRR (orange) and 40 Min FRR (purple) indicated on plan
Scope of Work and Not in Contract boundaries shown
cross_references: Ceiling Assembly detail references on same sheet
SLC #HE2 System A (referenced in C6 assembly)
FYDA paint finish (referenced in C4 assembly)

scope_notes: Five building sections at 1:100 scale
Section 1: East-West Section Through Mezzanine
Section 2: North-South Section Through Public Area
Section 3: North-South Section Through Children's and Stacks
Section 4: East-West Section Through Main Entrance
Section 5: East-West Section Through Adult Collection
Key floor levels indicated: Main Floor ±2.080, Mezzanine Level approx 5.163/5.165, US of Truss 30.738/30.163
Arched roof truss structure visible in North-South sections (Sections 2 and 3)
Mezzanine level shown in multiple sections with neighbouring building context
Scope of Work boundary clearly delineated in sections
New RTU noted - See Mechanical drawings (Sections 1, 4, 5)
All roof penetrations and curbs to be coordinated to BCABC standards (Section 4)
Structural upgrade scope only - See Structural drawings (noted in multiple sections)
East stair noted as NIC (Not in Contract) in Section 1
Parapet restraint detail reference: L.A-31-4-000
Rooms visible: Program Room, Kids, Book Processing, Branch Head Office, Meeting Room 2, Service Desk, Adult Lounge, Mezzanine
1hr FRR and 40 Min FRR fire ratings indicated
Neighbouring building shown on both sides in N-S sections
Door Schedule covering Main Floor and Second Floor doors

Door types: A (Solid Core Wood - Non Rated), B (Solid Core Wood - Fire Rated), C (Hollow Metal - Non Rated), D (Hollow Metal - Fire Rated), E (Insulated Metal Door), F (Glazed Interior Storefront), G (Double Door - Hollow Core Metal)
Door dimensions range from 815mm to 1874mm wide, heights at 2135mm standard
Hardware Groups 1-17 referenced throughout schedule
Fire ratings noted: 30MIN, 40MIN, 45MIN on select doors
Phase Created noted as Stage 3, Stage 5 for various doors
Existing Storefront and Existing doors noted

Main floor doors include: Meeting 1, Program Room, Meeting Room, Universal WC, W/C (x2), Meeting 2, Staff WC, Janitor, Lunch Room, Branch Head Office, Electrical, VPL Storage, Closets (x2), Electrical Vault, Vestibule (x2), Public (x2), Vestibule, Book Processing, BC Hydro Room, Exit Doors
Second Floor door: Public
Deadbolt with occupancy indicators noted for accessible WC doors
Key lock/Key box noted for storage and utility spaces
New ADO (automatic door opener) on existing door noted
Room Finish Schedule covering Main Floor rooms
Floor finishes: RF1 (Resilient Floor - Gray), RF2 (Resilient Floor - Blue), Existing Concrete
Base finishes: B1 (Rubber Base), B2 (Rubber Base), PLY2 (Plywood)
Wall finishes: PT01 (White), PT02 (Salmon Peach), PT03 (Light Blue), PT04 (Light Green), PT05 (Light Yellow), PT06 (Medium Blue), PT07 (Blue Gray), PT08 (Salmon), PT09 (Gray), PT010 (Dark Gray)
Ceiling finishes: ACT1 (Acoustic Ceiling Tile - White), ACT2 (Acoustic Ceiling Tile - Blue), PT01
Special finishes: TL (Wall Tile), GL (Existing glazing), HPL2 (Laminate - Gray), PLY1/PLY2 (Plywood), PDO (Perforated Density Overlay)
Wall protection at 1200mm AFF noted for high-traffic/clearance corners
Wall protection per drawings at columns to achieve 45min FRR noted for Stacks
Plywood backing for equipment noted in Electrical room
Door Schedule Notes include 14 items covering code compliance, hardware requirements, fire ratings, security, glazing, and access control
Room Finish Notes: all mechanical grilles/louvres/vents to be primed and painted to match adjacent wall or ceiling
A-72-4-004 referenced for visibility graphic size
